title: Me and My Girl
writer: John Paddy Carstairs, Robert Edmunds, Douglas Furber
actors: Lupino Lane, Sally Gray, Seymour Hicks
plot: When Bill Snibson, a Lambeth cockney, discovers that he is a descendant from the Earl of Hareford and that he will now be residing in a Mayfair mansion with a bunch of snobbish relatives, he still holds to her plain girlfriend Sal...
